title: calanthe ruthiae
intro: Calanthe ruthiae, a species of orchid commonly known as the 'Ruth's Calanthe', is a type of flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Calanthe ruthiae are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat various skin conditions, including wounds and eczema. In traditional herbal preparations, the roots and leaves of the plant are often used to create infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
